title: Counter
description: A basic timer in the action bar that shows how long you play in a world in singleplayer or shows how long the server runs.
body:
# Counter
A timer in the action bar that shows how long you played. Also you can create a countdown.

## Features
- A Timer or countdown
- Shows runtime of singleplayer world / server (or how long players played on the server)
- Custom configurable time format

## Data Save
- In Singleplayer, data is saved at world folder at **/counter/memory.json**
- In multiplayer, data is saved at at **/config/counter/memory.json**
- To configure time format, take a look at your game folder and then in **/counter/messages.json**

## Commands
- **/timer reset**: Reset the timer to 0\*
- **/timer resume**: Pause and resume the timer\*
- **/timer settings <setting> <value>**: Change a setting\*
- **/timer countdown <seconds>**: Start a countdown. Time Format in Seconds!\*

\* On servers, OP is needed

## Settings
- **pausedWhenNoOn**: Pause the timer when nobody is online (only useful for servers).
